← Flip Game

🦜 Parrot Flip

Caribbean pirate parrots (macaws included). Same flip physics.

Players — pick a parrot (🧑 tap for CPU)
Pass direction
CPU difficulty
Feel
Flick UP — harder = more spin. Land the parrot upright!
flick strength — green zone ≈ one clean flip
Pass to
Tap anywhere to flip

How to flip

  • Flick up from the parrot to toss it.
  • Harder flick = more spin. Find the snap that lands one clean turn.
  • Lean left/right to change which way it tumbles.
  • Land it upright for a MAKE.
🏆

Winner
